title: Population epigenomics of Swedish Arabidopsis

content: E-GEOD-65685 Population epigenomics of Swedish Arabidopsis methylation profiling by high throughput sequencing EFO EFO_0002761 Arabidopsis thaliana Plants display remarkable developmental and phenotypic plasticity in order to adapt to their environment.
